query:
SELECT 
  t.id, 
  t.title,
  t.status,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN tt.language = 'en' THEN 1 END) as en_translation_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN tt.language = 'en' THEN tt.field_name END) as en_fields
FROM tours t
LEFT JOIN tour_translations tt ON t.id = tt.tour_id
WHERE t.status = 'active'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.status
ORDER BY t.id;
